title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Navneet Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Navneet Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
